query:
-- Check DataGate billing items structure and their match status
SELECT 
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
LIMIT 20;
